DISCOVERY 612, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION FOR WRIT OF ATTACHMENT AS TO DEFENDANT PETER FADER IS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $153,266.02. THE UNDERTAKING IS SET IN THE AMOUNT OF $10,000. THE PROPERTY TO BE ATTACHED IS DESCRIBED WITH PARTICULARITY IN ATTACHMENT 9(C). THE PURPORTED CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS DENIED AS UNTIMELY. DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION HAS NOT BEEN CONSIDERED AS IT WAS FILED LATER THAN FIVE COURT DAYS PRIOR TO THE DATE SET FOR HEARING. SEE C.C.P. SECTION 484.060(A). COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Mo Of Pltf Edwin Train Caldwell For Order Compelling Depositions
Off Calendar Jun-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Motion To Compel Depositions And Production Of Materials Pursuant To April 3, 2007 Deposition Notices is granted. Counsel shall meet and confer on dates and schedule the depositions to proceed no later than June 22, 2007. Late opposition has been considered. Plaintiff's request for sanctions is denied. (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

Notice Of Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order And Writ Of Attachment (As To Deft Peter Fader)
Off Calendar Jun-01-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff's Application For Writ of Attachment As To Defendant Peter Fader is granted in the amount of $153,266.02. The undertaking is set in the amount of $10,000. The property to be attached is described with particularity in attachment 9(c). The purported claim of exemption is denied as untimely.
Defendant's opposition has not been considered as it was filed later than five court days prior to the date set for hearing. See C.C.P. Section 484.060(a). (612/EAH) COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT
